title: evolvulus gnaphalioides
intro: Evolvulus gnaphalioides, also known as Dwarf Bluedaze or Blue Spurred Portulaca, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a perennial herb that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Evolvulus gnaphalioides include its potential to treat coughs, colds, and flu, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Evolvulus gnaphalioides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal remedies, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
